name: 7-up Pound Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the margarine and oil together until smooth.
2. Gradually add in the sugar, beating well after each addition.
3. Beat in the eggs, one at a time, mixing thoroughly after each.
4. Alternately add in the flour and seven-up, mixing gently after each addition.
5. Stir in the vanilla and lemon flavorings.
6. Pour the batter into a greased and floured tube pan.
7. Bake at 325 degrees Fahrenheit for one hour and thirty minutes, or until done.
